headline: Guy's LinkedIn Post About 'Hustle Culture' Goes Viral For All The Wrong Reasons, Gets Ratio'd
summary: 'I wake up at 4 AM to grind' he wrote. 'I go to bed at 5 AM,' the top comment read.
fullBody: Jake Grindset posted 'I wake up at 4 AM to grind. Sleep is for the weak.' The internet responded. 'I wake up at 4 AM to cry,' one comment read. 'I go to bed at 5 AM,' read another. Jake's post has 47 times more comments than likes. He has since posted 'I'm taking a break from LinkedIn to focus on myself.' The break lasted 4 hours. He posted again. The ratio continues.
